title: Fgentic cross-org abuse report
description: Inbound abuse report from a federated partner (issue #350). A report maps to a break-glass containment action and a content-free evidence pack. It carries references (server_name, event IDs, policy digests) — never message bodies, prompts, or room content.

reporter_server_name.description: Exact Matrix server_name of the reporting partner (FQDN — D6).

subject_server_name.description: Exact Matrix server_name the report is about (FQDN — D6).

category.description: Abuse class. All are references to behaviour, never content.

requested_action.description: What the reporter asks for. 'contain' maps to fed:break-glass on the subject.

evidence_refs.description: Content-free references only: Matrix event IDs, policy digests, key IDs, or A2A task IDs — NEVER message bodies or prompt text.

contact.description: Optional out-of-band contact for the report (an address or ticket URL, not content).
